author: vvo
subject: test(stack): speedup testing, show nice JSX diffs
body:
Basically I switched to jsdom because:
- mocha cannot show nice diffs when assertions throws (https://gi
hub.com/mochajs/mocha/issues/1348)
- karma + mocha can be really slow
- you should only need a real browser in unit testing when debugging
weird stuff, so you have now npm run `test:watch:browser`
- integration testing will handle the "multi browser test"

I also added expect.toEqualJSX to get nice diffs.
